specific_question: What percentage of MediConn Solutions CRM system employees are actively utilizing the integrated AI?
answer: MediConn Solution's AI department conducted a survey of all employees in March 2025 and discovered that 80% said they are actively using the AI function of the CRM.
dr_question: According to an article in WTT Solutions from March 2025, Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software is trending. What kind of business data can this software analyze, which would aid in the growth of Mediconn Solutions' virtual healthcare clientele going into the year 2026?
